LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PLANT'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CASE CGC-16-552758 IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE CGC-16-553083 FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-16-552758 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE NUMBER AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHALL BE MADE UNDER THAT LEAD CASE NUMBER. COUNSEL FOR PLANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTIONS OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/RBU)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-553083 WITH CASE CGC-16-552758
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, L.P. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-553083 WITH CASE CGC-16-552758

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Plant's motion to consolidate is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Case CGC-16-552758 is consolidated with case CGC-16-553083 for all purposes. CGC-16-552758 is designated the lead case number and all future filings shall be made under that lead case number.

Counsel for Plant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
